untranslatable_reason: Signal describes options vertical spread construction logic (strike selection and directional mapping) which is a position structuring rule, not a price/technical indicator-based trading signal. The rule requires tracking of directional bias state, strike relationships, and options Greeks (implied volatility, time decay) — none of which are available in the allowed indicators list. Thresholds for strike_width, time_to_expiration_minimum_days, and profit_target_pct are marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] with no values provided. No price-based entry/exit conditions are specified in the source material.
translation_notes: This signal is from Natenberg's options trading framework and focuses on options strategy construction rather than directional entry/exit signals. A proxy using trend confirmation (ADX + SMA crossover) has been provided, but this does not capture the core options spread mechanics described in the rule. Implementation requires an options-specific backtester with Greeks calculation and directional bias state management.
